title: aspidium hastatum
intro: Aspidium hastatum, also known as the Lady fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aspidium hastatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
